channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran: ‘A whole civilisation will die tonight’
item.description: Donald Trump warned that “a whole civilisation will die tonight” if Iran does not open the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: From 9pm shutdowns to remote work: Egypt cuts fuel amid power crisis
item.description: Egypt is one of the countries implementing energy conservation measures amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: India’s nuclear leap: Why its fast breeder reactor success matters
item.description: India's most advanced reactor has set the country on a path towards potentially cutting its dependence on uranium.

item.title: Trump on Iran: ‘A whole civilisation will die tonight’
item.description: Increasingly angry US president escalates threats to Iran as his Democratic rivals rebuke him as 'sick' and 'genocidal'.

item.title: ‘Iranians reject idea that US will bring stability’
item.description: ‘Iranians reject idea that US will bring stability’

item.title: ‘Get a grip’: How Iranian embassies mocked Trump’s vulgar threat
item.description: Iran’s embassies launched a global trolling campaign in response to Trump's profanity-laced threat.

item.title: What’s Iran’s 10-point peace plan that Trump says is ‘not good enough’?
item.description: As US president's deadline looms, a ceasefire appears unlikely.

item.title: US-Israeli attacks on Iran are ‘clear and obvious war crimes’
item.description: ‘We’re in the time of monsters right now where we are headed towards the law of the jungle’.

item.title: Can Africa tackle the oil shock from the Iran war?
item.description: African nations are scrambling to secure oil and gas as the Iran war disrupts supplies from the Middle East.

item.title: Palestine weekly wrap: Protests sweep West Bank after death penalty law
item.description: Israeli strikes on Gaza escalate with children among the injured and civilians killed in densely populated areas.
